reviews.review_description: As an educator, CurioXR is the most meaningful educational app that I have interacted with in my journey to use VR tech in education. It has limitless user capabilities which greatly excites me. I cannot believe the app is free!

This app is honestly dope. It makes learning feel fun and not forced. You can spawn a full skeleton with all 206 bones labeled, play 3D tic tac toe, and just get lost in this cool little corner of the metaverse.

I work part-time in STEM education and I’ve found a bunch of ways to use Curio in lessons and workshops. What surprised me most is how smooth it runs for an early access app—barely any bugs or issues at all.

Can’t wait to see what else they add down the line. Definitely worth checking out.
I like not using my controllers and the science material is good. Can you add more math tools and content?

A great innovative app that provides an immersive learning experience. Our tutors at the Learning  Center greatly appreciate its features and its user-friendly interface.  We have already started implementing VR tutoring sessions, and the feedback from students and tutors has been amazing. We plan to fully offer this service at our Learning Center by Fall 2024.

reviews.review_title: Used in my chemistry class, very nice!
reviews.review_description: Had fun with my buddies, and the chemistry learning experiences were fun and informative.
CurioXR provides high-quality, immersive virtual reality educational content with an easy-to-use interface.
The immersive nature of Curio makes learning engaging for students. Looking forward to the SDK for builders coming out in the fall.
Meeting up online with other students in VR and being able to interact with the learning materials for free is really cool. Anatomy, chemistry, and biology are all quite amazing

reviews.review_title: Super fun, easy to use, and FREE!
reviews.review_description: Super fun, easy to use, and completely free. It makes learning in VR feel exciting and interactive. If you have a Meta Quest, you need to try it!
This app needs more content, especially in biology (please!), but love the tour of the heart!

Curio is a standout, immersive tool that is standards-aligned. The app seamlessly integrates fun with learning; fostering student engagement in educational content. Curio's thoughtfully designed content encourages critical thinking and exploration of standards leveraging real world application of the concepts to promote deeper understanding for students. Student's don't memorize facts - they engage, explore, apply, and extend their understanding in meaningful ways.

Curio XR is a playful and revolutionary way to experience learning. As a tutor, I often struggle to have my students engage in and enjoy my lessons, especially for subjects that are better taught as visual presentations rather than mechanized learning of facts. Curio XR’s immersive environment, which allows my students to both envision and experiment with a vast number of topics, has significantly enhanced the effectiveness of my tutoring sessions and accelerated the learning pace of my students. I encourage instructors across all subject areas to utilize Curio XR and strengthen the learning proficiency of their students and reputations of their respective schools.

Curio is an innovative tool that is both easy to use and fun! The app is so easy to navigate so people who have little or no experience with VR can easily jump in and those with a wealth of experience will also enjoy the app. CurioXR has immersive tools for students that truly bring real-world concepts to life, no matter where they are located. Curio is breaking down barriers and innovating to promote learning for all!

Curio is such an amazing and immersive tool that helps students better understand course material. Currently, on our campus, students (undergrad and graduate) use it during tutoring sessions and independent study time. Our students talk about how helpful the resource is to learn about classroom topics and want to consistently use it. Additionally, faculty in both undergrad and graduate courses use Curio in their classes, as well. Instructors utilize the app along with their lectures. Students and instructors are able to take these 3D concepts and learn about them in a 3D environment rather than on a sheet of paper.

Curio XR's freestyle molecule feature is awesome! Learning VSEPR Theory is like a cool adventure. You get to dive into the molecules and see how they work up close. It's like a 3D playground for science lovers!

I really like this app, it provides a lot of tools for teaching all of the vast subjects in schools. Videos, PDFs, drawing, shapes, etc. There is basically no limit (from my experience) to how you can use these tools. The app provides many ways to teach students, especially given the multiplayer allowed the teacher and students to be in basically a virtual classroom. App has great performance, many helpful tools, looks great, simple to pick up and learn (great for non-tech savvy teachers/students), and above all is fun.
